title: axonopus flexuosus
intro: Axonopus flexuosus, also known as Bristle Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Axonopus flexuosus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
